Hollywood Casino Amphitheatre
Maryland Heights, MO
Previous Names:
Riverport Amphitheatre (Changed after 2000)
UMB Bank Pavilion (Changed after 2006)
Verizon Wireless Amphitheater St. Louis (Changed after 2014)
Seating Capacity: 21000
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 21
  DMB  (20)
  Dave & Tim  (1)

Longest Performance:
09.19.00 - Two Step (27:34)

Song Liberations
  5.30.06 – Raven (after 1401 days)
  5.30.06 – Proudest Monkey (after 1360 days)
